Distributable reserves
The director reviewed the management accounts and confirmed the company had sufficient distributable
reserves at declaration time.

Resolution
It was resolved that an interim dividend of £30.00 per ordinary £1 share, totaling £3,000.00 , be declared on
03 Jul 2026 and paid by credit to the director's loan account.
